generalInfo.heading: 1. General Information (Mandatory)
generalInfo.title: Title
generalInfo.nicBrc: 1.4 National Identity Card No / Business Registration No

serviceInfo.heading: 2. Service Information
serviceInfo.note1: 1 Service deactivation period shall not exceed 04 months and can be applied once a year only
serviceInfo.note2: 2 Customer shall settle all outstanding amount upto the service deactivation commencement date
serviceInfo.note3: 3 Admin fee of Rs. 500/- (subject to government taxes) is payable, prior to commencement of service deactivation
serviceInfo.note4: 4 Telephone line rental will be charged during the vacation period for Megaline & SLT Fibre services
serviceInfo.note5: 5 Only Broadband and PEO TV rentals will be waived off during the period requested

agreement.heading: 3. Customer Agreement
agreement.declaration: I / We do hereby declare that the information furnished by me/us is true and correct and agree to abide by the Terms and Conditions stated herein below, which shall be supplementary to the 'Agreement for the Provision of Telecommunication Service' both of which shall be read together and those which I/we have read and understood regarding the Facility hereunder and those which may be enforced in future by Sri Lanka Telecom PLC (SLT)
agreement.agreeLabel: I agree to the Terms and Conditions

currentCustomer.heading: Form A - Current Customer Details
currentCustomer.customerNameNote: (as stated under the existing telephone application/agreement)
currentCustomer.partnershipNote: (If applicable, provide full names of all partners or the sole proprietor)
currentCustomer.transferTo: Kindly transfer the above telephone to following person/Company

newApplicant.heading: Form B - New Applicant Details
newApplicant.remarksNote: (* absence of the Customer, Changes in Billing Address / Packages type etc...)

documents.heading: Required Documents Checklist
documents.both: Both owner and spouse are dead
documents.noteText: In case the above specified documents are unavailable, you may contact the Regional Telecom Manager or the Manager of the nearest SLT Teleshop in your area.

docs.formA_or_consent: Form A in overleaf or letter of consent from present owner
docs.newOwnerNic: Photo copy of NIC of new owner
docs.form20: A copy of the form 20 obtained from the registrar of companies
docs.brCopy: A Copy of the Business Registration with the original
docs.companyRequest: Request letter from the company with two signatures of Directors (Embossed seal required)
docs.companyResolution: Company resolution to settle any outstanding arrears
docs.companyRequestOfficial: Request letter from the company with two signatures of Directors (Embossed seal is required)
docs.authLetter: Authorization letter of the respective organization
docs.consentPresentOwner: Consent letter from the present owner
docs.marriageCert: A copy of the Marriage Certificate with the original
docs.deathCert: A copy of the Death Certificate with the original
docs.birthCert: If above is not available Birth certificate of a legitimate child
docs.spouseRequest: A request letter of the spouse
docs.deathCertOrGs: A copy of the Death Certificate with the original or if the same is not available a letter from the GS certifying the death.
docs.marriageOrBirth: A copy of the Marriage Certificate or if the same is not available, Birth Certificate of a legitimate child.
docs.closestRelationRequest: Request letter of the closest relation (eg.-mother) certified the signature by JP (if unable to come)
docs.birthCertUser: Request letter and a copy of the Birth Certificate with original of the present user
docs.familyConsent: Consent letter from the family members
docs.gsJpCert: Certification of the G.S. or JP about the family members
docs.legalOwnerMissing: Legal owner unable to trace, not in the island or is dead
docs.tempForm: Temporarily Transfer Forms from SLT (Indemnity Bond)
docs.presentUserRequest: Request letter from the present user

declaration.heading: Declarations & Consents
declaration.currConsentText: I hereby authorize the transfer of the telephone connection to the applicant detailed in the previous step. I understand that this action transfers the service and associated facilities.
declaration.currConsentLabel: I, the current customer, consent to this transfer.
declaration.newDeclText: Kindly transfer the above telephone to my/our name. I am willing to take over the telephone service with existing all facilities and service already provided by SLT. I take responsibility of settling the bills with the outstanding balance.
declaration.newDeclLabel: I, the new applicant, accept responsibility and agree to the terms.
declaration.terms1: The changing of the ownership shall be at the sole discretion of SLT and SLT reserves the right to request any further documents if SLT so wishes.
declaration.terms2: The applicant shall be responsible to resolve any dispute which may arise between Customer and the Applicant and arise regarding the eligibility of the customer to transfer the telephone service in Applicants name and shall indemnify and keep SLT indemnified over any such disputes.
declaration.terms3: In the event of applicant's request being cancelled at any subsequent stage he shall with immediate effect settle all outstanding dues and shall at all times be liable to settle such outstanding dues.

preferences.disconnectExisting: 1.4 Disconnect the existing telephone line with effect from

agreement.heading: 2.0 Customer Agreement
agreement.para1: I / We, being the legal customer/s of the existing SLT service indicated in 1.1 above do hereby declare that the information furnished by me/us are true and correct and agree to abide by the terms and conditions of the telecommunication service agreement entered into in respect of the existing SLT services and the said terms and conditions shall continue to govern this relocation service.
agreement.para2: I / we have read and understood the further terms and conditions received herewith for the relocation and those which may be enforced in future by Sri Lanka Telecom PLC (SLT) and agree to abide by the same.
agreement.para3: I hereby absolve SLT of any liability of its failure or inability to transfer all the existing services that I/We have requested to be transferred to the new location due to any technical constrains or otherwise. Further I/We indemnify SLT of any loss or damage caused to me/us due to such difficulty or constraint on the part of SLT in provisioning any of the services at the new location.
agreement.agreeLabel: I agree to the Declaration and Terms & Conditions

serviceDetails.disconnectAll: b. Disconnect the telephone line with all facilities

serviceDetails.disconnectDate: 1.2 Disconnect the above requested service with effect from (Date)

reason.heading: 3. Reason for Disconnection
reason.desc: Please select the reasons for disconnecting the service to help us improve our service excellence.
reason.compDetailsDesc: Please specify the competitor and package you are switching to.

contact.heading: 2. Contact Details
contact.name: 2.1 Name of the person / Company
contact.nameNote: (Name should be the same as it appears under the agreement for provisioning of telecom services)
contact.nicBrc: 2.2 N.I.C. No. / Passport No. / Business Registration No.

agreement.heading: 4. Customer Agreement
agreement.para1: I do hereby declare that the information furnished by me are true and confirm that I have settled all the dues to SLT outstanding under the account number/s mentioned in this application.
agreement.para2: I further agree to indemnify and hold harmless SLT against any claim, action, demand, expense, loss or other liabilities which may arise in future due to negligence and /or omission and /or failure to fulfill any obligation on our part or for the using there service for illegal or immoral purpose or for the transmission and /or introduction of harmful computer viruses or programs into telecommunication network, computer systems, computers and computer apparatus, any unauthorized use of the service and the violation of any applicable laws and regulations by my self, during the tenor of the agreement.
agreement.agreeLabel: I accept the Declaration and agree to the Terms & Conditions
